title: Other business and professional items
description: Complete this section if you have any business income or expenses.

content_blocks.text: Watch our video for a demonstration on how to complete the business section in myTax.

items: Enter your small business entity depreciation information into the corresponding fields. For more information, see Small business entity simplified depreciation .
Enter your other business and professional items information into the corresponding fields. For more information, see More information on Other business and professional items .

content_text:
## Completing this section
Watch our video for a demonstration on how to complete the business section in myTax.
- Enter your small business entity depreciation information into the corresponding fields. For more information, see Small business entity simplified depreciation .
- Enter your other business and professional items information into the corresponding fields. For more information, see More information on Other business and professional items .
- Select Save .
